Stellaria media is a type of annual herbaceous plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antihistamine properties, which provide relief from skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues such as colds and flu.
